name: rcsb-utils-struct

metadata.name: rcsb.utils.struct
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: RCSB Python utility classes for accessing PDB primary structure data and features associated with these data

documentation:
# RCSB Python Primary Structure Data Utilities

[![Build Status](https://dev.azure.com/rcsb/RCSB%20PDB%20Python%20Projects/_apis/build/status/rcsb.py-rcsb_utils_struct?branchName=master)](https://dev.azure.com/rcsb/RCSB%20PDB%20Python%20Projects/_build/latest?definitionId=2&branchName=master)

## Introduction

Python utility classes for accessing PDB primary structure data and features
associated with these data.

### Installation

Download the library source software from the project repository:

```bash

git clone --recurse-submodules https://github.com/rcsb/py-rcsb_utils_struct.git

```

Optionally, run test suite (Python versions 2.7, and 3.7) using
[setuptools](https://setuptools.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) or
[tox](http://tox.readthedocs.io/en/latest/example/platform.html):

```bash
python setup.py test

or simply run

tox
```

Installation is via the program [pip](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/pip).

```bash
pip install rcsb.utils.struct

or for the local repository:

pip install .
```

from CATH flat files.

methods.name: rcsb.utils.struct.CathClassificationProvider.CathClassificationProvider.__extractNames
documentation:
From cath-b-newest-names:

    1 Mainly Alpha

    1.20 Up-down Bundle
    1.25 Alpha Horseshoe

    2.20 Single Sheet
    2.30 Roll
    2.40 Beta Barrel
    2.50 Clam
    2.60 Sandwich
    2.70 Distorted Sandwich
    2.80 Trefoil
    2.90 Orthogonal Prism

methods.name: rcsb.utils.struct.ScopClassificationProvider.ScopClassificationProvider.__buildAssignments
documentation:
Input internal data structure with domain assignments -

dmD[sunId] = (pdbId, [(authAsymId, begRes, endRes), ...], domain_name, sccs, sid_domain_assigned)

Returns:

   aD[(pdbId, authAsymId)] = [(domSunId, domainId, sccs, (authAsymId, resBeg, resEnd))]

methods.name: rcsb.utils.struct.ScopClassificationProvider.ScopClassificationProvider.__exportTreeNodeList

Create node list from the SCOPe (sunid) parent and name/description dictionaries.

Exclude the root node from the tree.

Extract SCOPe assignments, term descriptions and SCOP classifications
from SCOP flat files.

methods.name: rcsb.utils.struct.EcodClassificationProvider.EcodClassificationProvider.__exportTreeNodeList
documentation: Create node list from name dictionary and lineage dictionaries.

Extract ECOD domain assignments, term descriptions and ECOD classification hierarchy
from ECOD flat files.

http://prodata.swmed.edu/ecod/

See:
H. Cheng, R. D. Schaeffer, Y. Liao, L. N. Kinch, J. Pei, S. Shi, B. H. Kim, N. V. Grishin. (2014)
ECOD: An evolutionary classification of protein domains. PLoS Comput Biol 10(12): e1003926.

Linking details:  http://prodata.swmed.edu/ecod/complete/domain/<domainId>

                  http://prodata.swmed.edu/ecod/complete/domain/e6sl5G1

modules.name: rcsb.utils.struct.Scop2ClassificationProvider
documentation:
Extract SCOP2 domain assignments, term descriptions and SCOP2 classification hierarchy
from SCOP2 and SCOP2B flat files.
File:  Scop2ClassificationProvider.py
Date:  29-Jun-2021 jdw
Updates:
10-Sep-2021 jdw split tree with type and class roots
24-Feb-2022 dwp Resolve duplication issues with Scop2 tree node list, and fix parent ID lists for nodes with multiple parents
18-Apr-2023 aae Use "pickle" as default file format
18-Jul-2023 dwp Resolve duplication issues with Scop2 families list
23-Apr-2024 dwp SCOP2/SCOP2B website was shut down--turn off fetching of source data until/if new site is made available again
9-May-2024 dwp Adjust reload process to not re-download fallback data upon every instantiation
10-Jun-2024 dwp Update SCOP2 source to new website; restructure data reloading/building steps

classes.name: rcsb.utils.struct.Scop2ClassificationProvider.Scop2ClassificationProvider

methods.name: rcsb.utils.struct.Scop2ClassificationProvider.Scop2ClassificationProvider.getVersion
documentation: Returns the SCOP2 version

methods.name: rcsb.utils.struct.Scop2ClassificationProvider.Scop2ClassificationProvider.__fetchFromSource
documentation:
Fetch the classification names and domain assignments from SCOP2 and SCOP2B resources.

SCOP2 domain names:
    https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/scop/files/scop-des-latest.txt

SCOP2 domain hierarchy:
    https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/scop/files/scop-cla-latest.txt

SIFTS extrapolated SCOP2 and SCOP2B assignments:
    https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/msd/sifts/flatfiles/tsv/pdb_chain_scop2b_sf_uniprot.tsv.gz
    https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/msd/sifts/flatfiles/tsv/pdb_chain_scop2_uniprot.tsv.gz

methods.name: rcsb.utils.struct.Scop2ClassificationProvider.Scop2ClassificationProvider.__extractDomainHierarchy
documentation:
Extract the domain node identifier hierarchy from the SCOP2 representative assignment file ...

Returns:
    dict, dict, dict, dict, dict: parent and name type dictionaries, family and superfamily assignments, and
                                  domain to superfamily mapping

    ntD[domainId] = name type TP=protein type, CL=protein class, CF=fold, SF=superfamily, FA=family
    pD[child domain identifier] = parent domain identifier
    fD[(pdbId, authAsymId)] = [(faDomId, faId, authAsymId, resBeg, resEnd),]
    sfD[(pdbId, authAsymId)] = [(sfDomId, sfId, authAsymId, resBeg, resEnd),]
    domToSfD[domSfid] = sfId

Example assignment file:

# SCOP release 2021-05-27
# http://scop.mrc-lmb.cam.ac.uk
# based on PDB release 2021-05-14
# based on UniProt realese 2021-04-08
# based on SIFTS release 2021-05-19
# FA-DOMID FA-PDBID FA-PDBREG FA-UNIID FA-UNIREG SF-DOMID SF-PDBID SF-PDBREG SF-UNIID SF-UNIREG SCOPCLA
8045703 3H8D C:1143-1264 Q64331 1143-1264 8091604 3H8D C:1143-1264 Q64331 1143-1264 TP=1,CL=1000003,CF=2001470,SF=3002524,FA=4004627
8094330 6J56 A:1158-1282 Q9UM54 1167-1291 8094331 6J56 A:1158-1282 Q9UM54 1167-1291 TP=1,CL=1000003,CF=2001470,SF=3002524,FA=4004627
#

methods.name: rcsb.utils.struct.Scop2ClassificationProvider.Scop2ClassificationProvider.__extractScop2bSuperFamilyAssignments
documentation:
Extract the SCOP2B  SIFTS superfamily domain assignments for PDB structure entries.

Returns:

 aD[(pdbId, authAsymId)] = [(sfDomId, sfId, authAsymId, resBeg, resEnd),]

Example:

# 2021/06/12 - 05:52 | PDB: 23.21 | UniProt: 2021.03
  PDB     CHAIN   SF_DOMID        SP_PRIMARY      RES_BEG RES_END PDB_BEG PDB_END SP_BEG  SP_END
  5id7    B       8033045 P02768  197     388     197     388     221     412
  1o9x    A       8033045 P02768  197     388     197     388     221     412

methods.name: rcsb.utils.struct.Scop2ClassificationProvider.Scop2ClassificationProvider.__exportTreeNodeList
documentation:
Create node list from the SCOP2 parent and name/description dictionaries.

Exclude the root node from the tree.

Extract SCOP2 domain assignments, term descriptions and SCOP classification hierarchy
from SCOP and SCOP2B flat files.
